german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not a Barrier
german_requirement.subtitle: Majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility despite unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, indicating a concentration in generalist positions.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 53% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating mixed expectations for flexibility and on-site presence.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles demand AI skills or focus, indicating high industry reliance.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
